title: Data Agent Topics Manifest
description: The manifest of topics associated with a data source. Maps each topic's stable id to its human-readable markdown file name. The topic bodies live in sibling .md files referenced by fileName.

$schema.description: The schema version of the topics manifest file (e.g., "1.0.0").

topics.description: The list of topics for this data source, sorted by id for deterministic export.

items.title: Data Agent Topic Metadata
items.description: Represents a single topic and the markdown file that holds its body.

id.description: The stable, rename-safe identifier of the topic, which is a GUID.

fileName.description: The human-readable markdown file name of the topic body, relative to the topics folder (e.g., "revenue-definitions.md"). Must be a lowercase kebab-case slug ending in .md and must not be a canonical GUID.

displayName.description: The user-facing display name of the topic.

description.description: An optional short description of what the topic covers.
